values.name: trades_lookback
values.description: Lookback period when downloading trades (following a disconnect)

values.name: trades_lookback_on_restart
values.description: Lookback period when downloading trades (initial download)

values.name: trades_limit
values.description: Maximum number of trades per response (exchange limit)

values.name: time_series_limit
values.description: Maximum number of bars per response (exchange limit)
